commands.review_summary:
The PR adds default-on AI-generated session titles with `sessionTitle` config, `autoTitle` persistence/display plumbing, session event field additions, generated config baseline updates, focused tests, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defects: source inspection of the final head shows the async writer persists `autoTitle` after the reply has finished, while normal Control UI chat sends rely on session events rather than a fresh sessions reload. No runtime reproduction is needed to see that the new title can be invisible until refresh or a later event.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer product/privacy approval before an automated worker should amend or replace the branch.
